entries.title: 介绍
entries.description:
创建并运行您的第一个 GitLab `CI/CD` 管道，在开始之前，请确保您拥有：
- GitLab 中您想要使用 CI/CD 的项目
- 项目的维护者或所有者角色
如果您没有项目，可以在 <https://gitlab.com> 上免费创建一个公共项目
- 在存储库的根目录下创建一个 `.gitlab-ci.yml` 文件。该文件是您定义 `CI/CD` 作业的地方
- 转到`Settings` > `CI/CD` 并展开运行程序，只要您至少有一个运行器处于活动状态，旁边有一个绿色圆圈，您就有一个运行器可以处理您的工作

entries.title: 示例
entries.description:
`tags` 用于在不同的平台上运行作业，`only` 控制 `master` 分支提交触发
关键字
entries.code:
default:
  image: node:16

windows_job:
  only:
    - master
  tags:
    - windows
  script:
    - echo Hello, %USERNAME%!

linux_job:
  tags:
    - linux
  script:
    - echo "Hello, $USER!"

entries.title: 关键字
entries.description:
关键字 | 描述
:-- | --
[default](#default) | 工作关键字的自定义默认值 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#default)
[include](#include) | 从其他 YAML 文件导入配置 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#include)
[stages](#stages) | 管道阶段的名称和顺序 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#stages)
[variables](#variables) | 为管道中的所有作业定义 CI/CD 变量 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#variables)
[workflow](#workflow) | 控制运行什么类型的管道 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#workflow)

entries.title: 关键字
entries.description:
关键字 | 描述
:-- | --
[after_script](#after_script) | 覆盖一组在作业之后执行的命令 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#after_script)
[allow_failure](#allow_failure) | 允许作业失败。失败的作业不会导致管道失败 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#allow_failure)
[artifacts](#artifacts) | 成功时附加到作业的文件和目录列表 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#artifacts)
[before_script](#before_script) | 覆盖在作业之前执行的一组命令 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#before_script)
[cache](#cache) | 应在后续运行之间缓存的文件列表 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#cache)
[coverage](#coverage) | 给定作业的代码覆盖率设置 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#coverage)
[dast_configuration](#dast_configuration) | 在作业级别使用 DAST 配置文件中的配置 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#dast_configuration)
[dependencies](#dependencies) | 通过提供要从中获取工件的作业列表来限制将哪些工件传递给特定作业 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#dependencies)
[environment](#environment) | 作业部署到的环境的名称 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#environment)
[except](#only--except) | 控制何时不创建作业 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#only--except)
[extends](#extends) | 此作业继承自的配置条目 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#extends)
[image](#image) | 使用 Docker 镜像 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#image)
[inherit](#inherit) | 选择所有作业继承的全局默认值 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#inherit)
[interruptible](#interruptible) | 定义作业是否可以在被较新的运行冗余时取消 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#interruptible)
[needs](#needs) | 在阶段排序之前执行作业 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#needs)
[only](#only--except) | 控制何时创建作业 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#only--except)
[pages](#pages) | 上传作业的结果以与 GitLab Pages 一起使用 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#pages)
[parallel](#parallel) | 应并行运行多少个作业实例 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#parallel)
[release](#release) | 指示运行器生成释放对象 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#release)
[resource_group](#resource_group) | 限制作业并发 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#resource_group)
[retry](#retry) | 发生故障时可以自动重试作业的时间和次数 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#retry)
[rules](#rules) | 用于评估和确定作业的选定属性以及是否创建的条件列表 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#rules)
[script](#script) | 由运行器执行的 Shell 脚本 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#script)
[secrets](#secrets) | CI/CD 保密工作需要 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#secrets)
[services](#services) | 使用 Docker 服务映像 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#services)
[stage](#stage) | 定义作业阶段 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#stage)
[tags](#tags) | 用于选择跑步者的标签列表 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#tags)
[timeout](#timeout) | 定义优先于项目范围设置的自定义作业级超时 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#timeout)
[trigger](#trigger) | 定义下游管道触发器 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#trigger)
[variables](#variables) | 在作业级别定义作业变量 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#variables)
[when](#when) | 何时运行作业 [#](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/yaml/#when)

entries.title: 全局关键词
entries.description:
- [after_script](#after_script)
- [artifacts](#artifacts)
- [before_script](#before_script)
- [cache](#cache)
- [image](#image)
- [interruptible](#interruptible)
- [retry](#retry)
- [services](#services)
- [tags](#tags)
- [timeout](#timeout)
全局关键词

entries.title: default
entries.description: 在此示例中，`ruby:3.0` 是管道中所有作业的默认图像值。`rspec 2.7` 作业不使用默认值，因为它使用特定于作业的图像部分覆盖了默认值
entries.code:
default:
  image: ruby:3.0

rspec:
  script: bundle exec rspec

rspec 2.7:
  image: ruby:2.7
  script: bundle exec rspec

entries.title: include
entries.description: 在 `11.4` 中移至 `GitLab` 免费版，使用 `include` 将外部 `YAML` 文件包含在您的 `CI/CD` 配置中
entries.code:
include:
  - local: '/temp/.gitlab-ci-template.yml'

entries.title: include:local
entries.description: 使用 `include:local` 包含与 `.gitlab-ci.yml` 文件位于同一存储库中的文件
entries.code:
include:
  - local: '/temp/.gitlab-ci-template.yml'

entries.title: include:project
entries.description:
要在同一个 GitLab 实例上包含来自另一个私有项目的文件，请使用 `include:project` 和 `include:file`
您还可以指定一个 `ref`：
entries.code:
include:
  - project: 'group/my-project'
    ref: main    # Git branch
    file: '/templates/.gitlab-ci.yml'
  - project: 'group/my-project'
    ref: v1.0.0   # Git Tag
    file: '/templates/.gitlab-ci.yml'
  - project: 'group/my-project'
    ref: 787123b  # Git SHA
    file: '/templates/.gitlab-ci.yml'

entries.title: include:remote
entries.description: 使用带有完整 `URL` 的 `include:remote` 来包含来自不同位置的文件
entries.code:
include:
  - remote: 'https://gitlab.com/example-project/-/raw/main/.gitlab-ci.yml'

entries.title: include:template
entries.description:
使用 `include:template` 来包含 `.gitlab-ci.yml` 模板
多个 `include:template` 文件：
entries.code:
include:
  - template: Android-Fastlane.gitlab-ci.yml
  - template: Auto-DevOps.gitlab-ci.yml

entries.title: stages
entries.description:
使用阶段来定义包含作业组的阶段。如果 `.gitlab-ci.yml` 文件中未定义阶段，则默认管道阶段为：
- [.pre](#stage-pre)
- build
- test
- deploy
- [.post](#stage-post)
workflow
entries.code:
stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

entries.title: workflow:name
entries.description:
您可以在 workflow: 中使用 name 来定义管道的名称
根据管道条件具有不同管道名称的配置：
entries.code:
variables:
  PIPELINE_NAME: '默认管道名称'

workflow:
  name: '$PIPELINE_NAME'
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
      variables:
        PIPELINE_NAME: 'MR pipeline: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_LABELS =~ /pipeline:run-in-ruby3/'
      variables:
        PIPELINE_NAME: 'Ruby 3 pipeline'

entries.title: workflow:rules:variables
entries.description: 您可以在 `workflow:rules` 中使用变量来定义特定管道条件的变量
entries.code:
variables:
  DEPLOY_VARIABLE: "default-deploy"

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      variables:
        DEPLOY_VARIABLE: "deploy-production"  # 覆盖全局定义的 DEPLOY_VARIABLE
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME =~ /feature/
      variables:
        IS_A_FEATURE: "true"                  # 定义一个新变量
    - when: always                            # 在其他情况下运行管道

job1:
  variables:
    DEPLOY_VARIABLE: "job1-default-deploy"
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      variables:                                   # 覆盖定义的 DEPLOY_VARIABLE
        DEPLOY_VARIABLE: "job1-deploy-production"  # 在工作层面。
    - when: on_success                             # 在其他情况下运行作业
  script:
    - echo "以 $DEPLOY_VARIABLE 作为参数运行脚本"
    - echo "如果 $IS_A_FEATURE 存在则运行另一个脚本"

job2:
  script:
    - echo "以 $DEPLOY_VARIABLE 作为参数运行脚本"
    - echo "如果 $IS_A_FEATURE 存在则运行另一个脚本"

entries.title: workflow:rules
entries.description:
工作流(workflow)中的 `rules` 关键字类似于作业中定义的 [`rules`](#rules)，但控制是否创建整个管道
- [rules: if](#rulesif)
- [rules: changes](#ruleschanges)
- [rules: exists](#rulesexists)
- [when](#when)
- [variables](#workflowrulesvariables)
Job 关键词
entries.code:
workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TITLE =~ /-draft$/
      when: never
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH

entries.title: after_script
entries.description: 在每个作业（包括失败的作业）**之后**运行的命令数组
entries.code:
job:
  script:
    - echo "示例脚本部分"
  after_script:
    - echo "在“script”部分完成后执行此命令"

entries.title: allow_failure
entries.description:
确定管道是否应在作业失败时继续运行

**allow_failure:exit_codes**
控制何时允许作业失败。对于任何列出的退出代码，作业是 `allow_failure: true`，对于任何其他退出代码，`allow_failure` false
entries.code:
test_job_1:
  script:
    - echo "退出代码 1 的脚本。此作业失败"
    - exit 1
  allow_failure:
    exit_codes: 137

test_job_2:
  script:
    - echo "退出代码 137 的脚本允许此作业失败"
    - exit 137
  allow_failure:
    exit_codes:
      - 137
      - 255

entries.title: dast_configuration
entries.description: 指定要在 CI/CD 配置中使用的站点配置文件和扫描仪配置文件。 两个配置文件必须首先在项目中创建。 作业的阶段必须快
entries.code:
stages:
  - build
  - dast

include:
  - template: DAST.gitlab-ci.yml

dast:
  dast_configuration:
    site_profile: "Example Co"
    scanner_profile: "Quick Passive Test"

entries.title: before_script
entries.description: 在每个作业的 `script` 命令之前运行，但在工件恢复之后运行
entries.code:
job:
  before_script:
    - echo "在任何“script:”命令之前执行此命令"
  script:
    - echo "“before_script”命令之后执行"

entries.title: coverage
entries.description: 使用自定义正则表达式的覆盖率来配置如何从作业输出中提取代码覆盖率
entries.code:
job1:
  script: rspec
  coverage: '/Code coverage: \d+\.\d+/'

entries.title: extends
entries.description: 使用 `extends` 重用配置部分。 它是 YAML 锚点的替代品，并且更加灵活和可读
entries.code:
.tests:
  script: rake test
  stage: test
  only:
    refs:
      - branches

rspec:
  extends: .tests
  script: rake rspec
  only:
    variables:
      - $RSPEC

entries.title: dependencies
entries.description: 定义要从中获取工件的作业列表。您还可以将作业设置为根本不下载任何工件
entries.code:
build osx:
  stage: build
  script: make build:osx
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - binaries/

build linux:
  stage: build
  script: make build:linux
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - binaries/

test osx:
  stage: test
  script: make test:osx
  dependencies:
    - build osx

test linux:
  stage: test
  script: make test:linux
  dependencies:
    - build linux

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script: make deploy
  environment: production

entries.title: inherit
entries.description:
使用 inherit 控制默认关键字和变量的继承

**inherit:default**
使用 `inherit:default` 控制 `default` 关键字的继承

**inherit:variables**
使用 inherit:variables 控制全局变量关键字的继承
entries.code:
variables:
  VARIABLE1: "这是变量 1"
  VARIABLE2: "这是变量 2"
  VARIABLE3: "这是变量 3"

job1:
  script: echo "该作业不继承任何全局变量"
  inherit:
    variables: false

job2:
  script: echo "此作业仅继承列出的两个全局变量。它不继承“VARIABLE3”"
  inherit:
    variables:
      - VARIABLE1
      - VARIABLE2

entries.title: interruptible
entries.description: 如果在作业完成之前启动较新的管道时应取消作业，则使用可中断的
entries.code:
stages:
  - stage1
  - stage2
  - stage3

step-1:
  stage: stage1
  script:
    - echo "可以取消"
  interruptible: true

step-2:
  stage: stage2
  script:
    - echo "不能取消"

step-3:
  stage: stage3
  script:
    - echo "因为第 2 步无法取消，所以此步骤永远无法取消，即使它被设置为可中断"
  interruptible: true

entries.title: pages
entries.description: 使用页面定义将静态内容上传到 `GitLab` 的 `GitLab Pages` 作业。然后将内容发布为网站
entries.code:
pages:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - mkdir .public
    - cp -r * .public
    - mv .public public
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - public
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  environment: production

entries.title: parallel
entries.description:
使用 `parallel` 在单个管道中并行多次运行作业

**parallel:matrix**
使用 `parallel:matrix` 在单个管道中并行多次运行作业，但每个作业实例具有不同的变量值
entries.code:
deploystacks:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - bin/deploy
  parallel:
    matrix:
      - PROVIDER: aws
        STACK:
          - monitoring
          - app1
          - app2
      - PROVIDER: ovh
        STACK: [monitoring, backup, app]
      - PROVIDER: [gcp, vultr]
        STACK: [data, processing]
  environment: $PROVIDER/$STACK

entries.title: resource_group
entries.description: 创建一个资源组，以确保作业在同一项目的不同管道之间互斥
entries.code:
deploy-to-production:
  script: deploy
  resource_group: production

entries.title: tags
entries.description: 使用标签从项目可用的所有运行器列表中选择特定运行器
entries.code:
job:
  tags:
    - ruby
    - postgres

entries.title: retry
entries.description:
使用 `retry` 配置作业失败时重试的次数。如果未定义，则默认为 `0`，并且作业不会重试

**retry:when**
使用 `retry:when` 和 `retry:max` 来重试特定失败案例的作业。 `retry:max` 是最大重试次数，和`retry`一样，可以是0、1、2
entries.code:
test:
  script: rspec
  retry:
    max: 2
    when: runner_system_failure

entries.title: script
entries.description: 使用脚本指定运行器执行的命令
entries.code:
job1:
  script: "bundle exec rspec"

job2:
  script:
    - uname -a
    - bundle exec rspec

entries.title: secrets
entries.description:
此关键字必须与 `secrets:vault` 一起使用

**secrets:vault**
使用 `secrets:vault` 指定 HashiCorp Vault 提供的秘密

**secrets:file**
使用 `secrets:file` 将秘密配置为存储为文件或变量类型的 CI/CD 变量
entries.code:
job:
  secrets:
    DATABASE_PASSWORD:
      vault: production/db/password@ops
      file: false

entries.title: timeout
entries.description: 为特定作业配置超时。 如果作业运行时间超过超时时间，则作业失败
entries.code:
build:
  script: build.sh
  timeout: 3 hours 30 minutes

test:
  script: rspec
  timeout: 3h 30m

entries.title: services
entries.description:
使用服务指定额外的 `Docker` 映像以在其中运行脚本

**service:pull_policy**
运行器用于获取 `Docker` 映像的拉取策略
entries.code:
job1:
  script: echo "A single pull policy."
  services:
    - name: postgres:11.6
      pull_policy: if-not-present

job2:
  script: echo "Multiple pull policies."
  services:
    - name: postgres:11.6
      pull_policy: [always, if-not-present]

entries.title: stage
entries.description:
**stage: .pre**

**stage: .post**
entries.code:
stages:
  - build
  - test

job1:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "该作业在构建阶段运行"

last-job:
  stage: .post
  script:
    - echo "该作业在 .post 阶段运行，在所有其他阶段之后"

job2:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "该作业在测试阶段运行"

entries.title: trigger
entries.description:
声明一个作业是一个“触发作业”

**trigger:include**
声明作业是启动子管道的“触发器作业”

**trigger:project**
声明作业是启动多项目管道的“触发器作业”

**trigger:strategy**
强制触发作业等待下游管道完成后再标记为成功

**trigger:forward**
entries.code:
variables: # 每个作业的默认变量
  VAR: value

# 默认行为：
# - VAR 传递给孩子
# - MYVAR 没有传递给孩子
child1:
  trigger:
    include: .child-pipeline.yml

# 转发管道变量：
# - VAR 传递给孩子
# - MYVAR 传递给孩子
child2:
  trigger:
    include: .child-pipeline.yml
    forward:
      pipeline_variables: true

# 不要转发 YAML 变量：
# - VAR 不会传递给孩子
# - MYVAR 没有传递给孩子
child3:
  trigger:
    include: .child-pipeline.yml
    forward:
      yaml_variables: false

entries.title: variables
entries.description:
CI/CD 变量是传递给作业的可配置值。使用变量创建自定义变量

**variables:description**

**variables:expand**
使用 `expand` 关键字将变量配置为可扩展或不可扩展
entries.code:
variables:
  VAR1: value1
  VAR2: value2 $VAR1
  VAR3:
    value: value3 $VAR1
    expand: false

entries.title: when
entries.description:
使用 `when` 配置作业运行的条件。如果未在作业中定义，则默认值为 `when:on_success`
:- | --
:- | --
`on_success(default)` | 仅当早期阶段的所有作业都成功或具有 `allow_failure: true` 时才运行该作业
`manual` | 仅在手动触发时运行作业
`always` | 无论早期阶段的作业状态如何，都运行作业。也可以用在 `workflow:rules` 中
`on_failure` | 仅当早期阶段的至少一项作业失败时才运行该作业
`delayed` | 将作业的执行延迟指定的持续时间
`never` | 不要运行作业。只能在规则[rules](#rules)部分或工作流中使用：`workflow: rules`
artifacts
entries.code:
stages:
  - build
  - cleanup_build
  - test
  - deploy
  - cleanup

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - make build

cleanup_build_job:
  stage: cleanup_build
  script:
    - cleanup build when failed
  when: on_failure

test_job:
  stage: test
  script:
    - make test

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - make deploy
  when: manual
  environment: production

cleanup_job:
  stage: cleanup
  script:
    - cleanup after jobs
  when: always

entries.title: artifacts:paths
entries.description: 路径是相对于项目目录（$CI_PROJECT_DIR）的，不能直接链接到项目目录之外
entries.code:
job:
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - binaries/
      - .config

entries.title: artifacts:exclude
entries.description: 防止将文件添加到 artifacts 存档中
entries.code:
artifacts:
  paths:
    - binaries/
  exclude:
    - binaries/**/*.o

entries.title: artifacts:expire_in
entries.description:
指定作业 artifacts 在它们过期和被删除之前存储多长时间
- '42'
- 42 seconds
- 3 mins 4 sec
- 2 hrs 20 min
- 2h20min
- 6 mos 1 day
- 47 yrs 6 mos and 4d
- 3 weeks and 2 days
- never
entries.code:
job:
  artifacts:
    expire_in: 1 week

entries.title: artifacts:expose_as
entries.description: 使用 `artifacts:expose_as` 关键字在合并请求 UI 中公开作业 artifacts
entries.code:
test:
  script: ["echo 'test' > file.txt"]
  artifacts:
    expose_as: 'artifact 1'
    paths: ['file.txt']

entries.title: artifacts:name
entries.description: 定义创建的 `artifacts` 存档的名称。您可以为每个存档指定一个唯一的名称
entries.code:
job:
  artifacts:
    name: "job1-artifacts-file"
    paths:
      - binaries/

entries.title: artifacts:public
entries.description: 确定作业工件是否应该公开可用
entries.code:
job:
  artifacts:
    public: false

entries.title: artifacts:reports
entries.description: 收集作业中包含的模板生成的 `artifacts`
entries.code:
rspec:
  stage: test
  script:
    - bundle install
    - rspec --format RspecJunitFormatter --out rspec.xml
  artifacts:
    reports:
      junit: rspec.xml

entries.title: artifacts:untracked
entries.description: 将所有 Git 未跟踪文件添加为 `artifacts`（连同在 `artifacts:paths` 中定义的路径）
entries.code:
job:
  artifacts:
    untracked: true

entries.title: artifacts:when
entries.description:
作业失败或尽管失败时上传 `artifacts`
cache
entries.code:
job:
  artifacts:
    when: on_failure

entries.title: cache:paths
entries.description: 关键字来选择要缓存的文件或目录
entries.code:
rspec:
  script:
    - echo "此作业使用缓存"
  cache:
    key: binaries-cache
    paths:
      - binaries/*.apk
      - .config

entries.title: cache:key
entries.description:
为每个缓存提供唯一的标识键。 使用相同缓存键的所有作业都使用相同的缓存，包括在不同的管道中

**`cache:key:files`**
当一个或两个特定文件更改时，使用 `cache:key:files` 关键字生成新密钥

**`cache:key:prefix`**
使用 `cache:key:prefix` 将前缀与为 `cache:key:files` 计算的 SHA 结合起来
entries.code:
rspec:
  script:
    - echo "此 rspec 作业使用缓存"
  cache:
    key:
      files:
        - Gemfile.lock
      prefix: $CI_JOB_NAME
    paths:
      - vendor/ruby

entries.title: cache:untracked
entries.description: 使用 `untracked: true` 缓存 Git 存储库中所有未跟踪的文件
entries.code:
rspec:
  script: test
  cache:
    untracked: true
    paths:
      - binaries/

entries.title: cache:when
entries.description:
使用 `cache:when` 根据作业的状态定义何时保存缓存
:- | --
:- | --
`on_succes(默认)` | 仅当作业成功时才保存缓存
`on_failure` | 仅在作业失败时才保存缓存
`always` | 始终保存缓存
entries.code:
rspec:
  script: rspec
  cache:
    paths:
      - rspec/
    when: 'always'

entries.title: cache:policy
entries.description:
要更改缓存的上传和下载行为，请使用 `cache:policy` 关键字
environment
entries.code:
prepare-dependencies-job:
  stage: build
  cache:
    key: gems
    paths:
      - vendor/bundle
    policy: push
  script:
    - echo "此作业仅下载依赖项并构建缓存"
    - echo "正在下载依赖..."

faster-test-job:
  stage: test
  cache:
    key: gems
    paths:
      - vendor/bundle
    policy: pull
  script:
    - echo "此作业脚本使用缓存，但不更新它"
    - echo "运行测试..."

entries.title: environment:name
entries.description: 为环境设置名称
entries.code:
deploy to production:
  stage: deploy
  script: git push production HEAD:main
  environment:
    name: production

entries.title: environment:url
entries.description: 为环境设置 URL
entries.code:
deploy to production:
  stage: deploy
  script: git push production HEAD:main
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://prod.example.com

entries.title: environment:on_stop
entries.description: 关闭（停止）环境可以通过在环境下定义的 on_stop 关键字来实现。 它声明运行以关闭环境的不同作业

entries.title: environment:action
entries.description:
:- | --
:- | --
`start` _默认值_ | 指示作业启动环境。在作业开始后创建的
`prepare` | 表示作业只是准备环境。它不会触发部署
`stop` | 指示作业停止部署
`verify` | 指示作业仅验证环境。它不会触发部署
`access` | 指示作业仅访问环境。它不会触发部署
entries.code:
stop_review_app:
  stage: deploy
  variables:
    GIT_STRATEGY: none
  script: make delete-app
  when: manual
  environment:
    name: review/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG
    action: stop

entries.title: environment:auto_stop_in
entries.description:
- `168 hours`
- `7 days`
- `one week`
- `never`
`auto_stop_in` 关键字指定环境的生命周期。 当环境到期时，GitLab 会自动停止它
entries.code:
review_app:
  script: deploy-review-app
  environment:
    name: review/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG
    auto_stop_in: 1 day

entries.title: environment:kubernetes
entries.description: 使用 `kubernetes` 关键字将部署配置到与您的项目关联的 `Kubernetes` 集群
entries.code:
deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script: make deploy-app
  environment:
    name: production
    kubernetes:
      namespace: production

entries.title: environment:deployment_tier
entries.description:
- `production`
- `staging`
- `testing`
- `development`
- `other`
entries.code:
deploy:
  script: echo
  environment:
    name: customer-portal
    deployment_tier: production

entries.title: 动态 environment
entries.description: image
entries.code:
deploy as review app:
  stage: deploy
  script: make deploy
  environment:
    name: review/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG
    url: https://$CI_ENVIRONMENT_SLUG.example.com/

entries.title: image:name
entries.description: 作业运行所在的 Docker 镜像的名称。类似于它自己使用的镜像
entries.code:
image:
  name: "registry.example.com/my/image:latest"

entries.title: image:entrypoint
entries.description: 作为容器入口点执行的命令或脚本
entries.code:
image:
  name: super/sql:experimental
  entrypoint: [""]

entries.title: image:pull_policy
entries.description:
运行器用于获取 Docker 映像的拉取策略
needs
entries.code:
job1:
  script: echo "单一拉动政策"
  image:
    name: ruby:3.0
    pull_policy: if-not-present

job2:
  script: echo "多重拉动政策"
  image:
    name: ruby:3.0
    pull_policy: [always, if-not-present]

entries.title: needs:artifacts
entries.description: 当作业使用需求时，它不再默认下载先前阶段的所有工件，因为有需求的作业可以在早期阶段完成之前开始
entries.code:
test-job1:
  stage: test
  needs:
    - job: build_job1
      artifacts: true

test-job2:
  stage: test
  needs:
    - job: build_job2
      artifacts: false

test-job3:
  needs:
    - job: build_job1
      artifacts: true
    - job: build_job2
    - build_job3

entries.title: needs:project
entries.description: 使用 `needs:project` 从其他管道中的最多五个作业下载工件。工件是从指定参考的最新成功管道下载的。要指定多个作业，请将每个作业作为单独的数组项添加到 needs 关键字下
entries.code:
build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - ls -lhR
  needs:
    - project: namespace/group/project-name
      job: build-1
      ref: main
      artifacts: true
    - project: namespace/group/project-name-2
      job: build-2
      ref: main
      artifacts: true

entries.title: needs:pipeline:job
entries.description: 子管道可以从其父管道中的作业或同一父子管道层次结构中的另一个子管道下载工件
entries.code:
create-artifact:
  stage: build
  script: echo "sample artifact" > artifact.txt
  artifacts:
    paths: [artifact.txt]

child-pipeline:
  stage: test
  trigger:
    include: child.yml
    strategy: depend
  variables:
    PARENT_PIPELINE_ID: $CI_PIPELINE_ID

entries.title: needs:optional
entries.description: 要需要管道中有时不存在的作业，请将 `optional: true` 添加到需求配置中。如果未定义，则可选：默认为 `false`
entries.code:
build-job:
  stage: build

test-job1:
  stage: test

test-job2:
  stage: test
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH

deploy-job:
  stage: deploy
  needs:
    - job: test-job2
      optional: true
    - job: test-job1
  environment: production

review-job:
  stage: deploy
  needs:
    - job: test-job2
      optional: true
  environment: review

entries.title: needs:pipeline
entries.description:
您可以使用 `needs:pipeline` 关键字将管道状态从上游管道镜像到桥接作业
only / except
entries.code:
upstream_bridge:
  stage: test
  needs:
    pipeline: other/project

entries.title: only:refs / except:refs
entries.description: 使用 `only:refs` 和 `except:refs` 关键字来控制何时根据分支名称或管道类型将作业添加到管道
entries.code:
job1:
  script: echo
  only:
    - main
    - /^issue-.*$/
    - merge_requests

job2:
  script: echo
  except:
    - main
    - /^stable-branch.*$/
    - schedules

entries.title: only:variables / except:variables
entries.description: 根据 CI/CD 变量的状态，使用 only:variables 或 except:variables 关键字来控制何时将作业添加到管道
entries.code:
deploy:
  script: cap staging deploy
  only:
    variables:
      - $RELEASE == "staging"
      - $STAGING

entries.title: only:changes / except:changes
entries.description: 当 `Git` 推送事件修改文件时，使用 `changes` 关键字仅运行作业，或使用 `except` 跳过作业
entries.code:
docker build:
  script: docker build -t my-image:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG .
  only:
    refs:
      - branches
    changes:
      - Dockerfile
      - docker/scripts/*
      - dockerfiles/**/*
      - more_scripts/*.{rb,py,sh}
      - "**/*.json"

entries.title: only:kubernetes / except:kubernetes
entries.description:
使用 `only:kubernetes` 或 `except:kubernetes` 来控制当 `Kubernetes` 服务在项目中处于活动状态时是否将作业添加到管道中
release
entries.code:
deploy:
  only:
    kubernetes: active

entries.title: release 参考
entries.description:
:- | --
:- | --
[release:tag_name](#releasetag_name) | 发布的 Git 标签
[release:tag_message](#releasetag_message) | 指定的消息进行注释
[release:name](#releasename) | 发布名称
[release:description](#releasedescription) | 版本的详细描述
[release:ref](#releaseref) | 发布的 ref
[release:milestones](#releasemilestones) | 每个里程碑的标题
[release:released_at](#releasereleased_at) | 发布准备就绪的日期和时间

entries.title: release:tag_name
entries.description: 必需的。发布的 Git 标签
entries.code:
job:
  script: echo "为新标签运行发布作业"
  release:
    tag_name: $CI_COMMIT_TAG
    description: 'Release description'
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG

entries.title: release:tag_message
entries.description: 如果标签不存在，则新创建的标签将使用 `tag_message` 指定的消息进行注释
entries.code:
release_job:
  stage: release
  release:
    tag_name: $CI_COMMIT_TAG
    description: 'Release description'
    tag_message: 'Annotated tag message'

entries.title: release:name
entries.description: 发布名称。如果省略，它会填充 `release:tag_name` 的值
entries.code:
release_job:
  stage: release
  release:
    name: 'Release $CI_COMMIT_TAG'

entries.title: release:description
entries.description: 版本的详细描述
entries.code:
job:
  release:
    tag_name: ${MAJOR}_${MINOR}_${REVISION}
    description: './path/to/CHANGELOG.md'

entries.title: release:ref
entries.description: 发布的 ref，如果发布：`tag_name` 尚不存在

entries.title: release:milestones
entries.description: 与版本关联的每个里程碑的标题

entries.title: release:released_at
entries.description: 发布准备就绪的日期和时间

entries.title: release:assets:links
entries.description:
使用 `release:assets:links` 在发布中包含资产链接
rules
entries.code:
assets:
  links:
    - name: 'asset1'
      url: 'https://example.com/assets/1'
    - name: 'asset2'
      url: 'https://example.com/assets/2'
      filepath: '/pretty/url/1' # 可选的
      link_type: 'other' # 可选的

entries.title: rules:if
entries.description: 使用 `rules:if` 子句指定何时将作业添加到管道
entries.code:
job:
  script: echo "Hello, Rules!"
  rules:
    - if: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME =~ /^feature/ && $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_NAME != $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: never
    - if: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME =~ /^feature/
      when: manual
      allow_failure: true
    - if: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME

entries.title: rules:changes
entries.description:
使用 `rules:changes` 通过检查对特定文件的更改来指定何时将作业添加到管道

**rules:changes:paths**
使用 `rules:changes` 指定仅在更改特定文件时将作业添加到管道，并使用 `rules:changes:paths` 指定文件

**rules:changes:compare_to**
使用 `rules:changes:compare_to` 指定要比较哪个 `ref` 来比较 `rules:changes:paths` 下列出的文件的更改
entries.code:
docker build:
  script: docker build -t my-image:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG .
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
      changes:
        paths:
          - Dockerfile
        compare_to: 'refs/heads/branch1'

entries.title: rules:exists
entries.description: 当存储库中存在某些文件时，使用 `exists` 运行作业
entries.code:
job:
  script: docker build -t my-image:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG .
  rules:
    - exists:
        - Dockerfile

entries.title: rules:allow_failure
entries.description: 在规则中使用 `allow_failure: true` 允许作业失败而不停止管道
entries.code:
job:
  script: echo "Hello, Rules!"
  rules:
    - if: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_NAME == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: manual
      allow_failure: true

entries.title: rules:variables
entries.description:
在规则中使用变量来为特定条件定义变量
另见
entries.code:
job:
  variables:
    DEPLOY_VARIABLE: "default-deploy"
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      variables:                              # 覆盖定义的 DEPLOY_VARIABLE
        DEPLOY_VARIABLE: "deploy-production"  # 在工作层面
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME =~ /feature/
      variables:
        IS_A_FEATURE: "true"                  # 定义一个新变量
  script:
    - echo "以 $DEPLOY_VARIABLE 作为参数运行脚本"
    - echo "如果 $IS_A_FEATURE 存在则运行另一个脚本"
